name: Perplexity MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Perplexity MCP server providing real-time web search, AI reasoning, and research capabilities through Perplexity's API. Enables AI agents to query Perplexity for current web information, sourced answers with citations, and deep research synthesis — extending any AI agent with live web knowledge.
use_cases: Providing real-time web search results with citations to AI research agents
Supplementing AI assistant knowledge with current information from the web
Building deep research workflows using Perplexity's sonar reasoning models
Enabling news and current events retrieval for time-sensitive agent tasks
not_for: Offline or air-gapped environments (requires internet for real-time search)
High-volume batch web crawling (API rate limits and costs)
best_when: An AI agent needs access to current information beyond its training cutoff — Perplexity provides sourced, up-to-date web answers that can be embedded in any agent's reasoning pipeline.
avoid_when: You need private or internal document search. Also: Perplexity API has per-query costs that add up at scale.

auth.notes: Perplexity API key required. Get from perplexity.ai settings. Remote streamable HTTP MCP endpoint.

pricing.free_tier_limits: $5 free credit for new API users
pricing.notes: Per-query API costs. Sonar models vary by price/capability. Add budget caps to prevent runaway agent spending.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by plan; default limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Each query incurs API cost — implement budget tracking for high-frequency agents
Real-time web results may include inaccurate or outdated information — citations help but don't guarantee accuracy
Sonar model selection affects quality vs cost — specify model appropriately for use case
Remote-only MCP endpoint — latency of 1-5s per search query may slow synchronous agent loops
Web search results pass through Perplexity's systems — sensitive queries may be logged
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Per-query costs. Official Perplexity MCP. Search queries may be logged. API key security required. Citations provided but accuracy not guaranteed.

security_score_components.security_notes: Official Perplexity. API key security. Search query privacy — queries logged by Perplexity. HTTPS enforced. Per-query financial cost.
